I should add that Nvidia is also worth more than the entire British stock ...

headline: 7 Times Oversubscribed. Why Wall Street Is Wild for SK Hynix.
summary: SK Hynix  closed higher Thursday ahead of the South Korean company’s listing of American depositary receipts.  The shares closed up 5.3% in South Korean trading at 2.186 million won, or about $1,445, on Thursday.  After the U.S. close, the company priced its ADR listing at $149 per share, raising $26.5 billion, according to the Wall Street Journal.

content.title: 7 Times Oversubscribed. Why Wall Street Is Wild for SK Hynix.
content.summary: SK Hynix  closed higher Thursday ahead of the South Korean company’s listing of American depositary receipts.  The shares closed up 5.3% in South Korean trading at 2.186 million won, or about $1,445, on Thursday.  After the U.S. close, the company priced its ADR listing at $149 per share, raising $26.5 billion, according to the Wall Street Journal.
